items.hook: The Reluctant King is the overall title of a trilogy of fantasy novels written by L.
items.body: Sprague de Camp as part of his Novarian series, as well as the 1983 omnibus collection gathering the books together into one volume. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: The 85-year-old living in her own art installation
items.body: After careers as a teacher, cookbook author and TV chef, Sue Kreitzman's life took a different path.

items.hook: A Man Called Otto is a 2022 American comedy-drama film directed by Marc Forster from a screenplay by David Magee.
items.body: It is a remake of the 2015 Swedish film A Man Called Ove, which was based on the 2012 novel of the same name by Fredrik Backman. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: ‘He annotated my letter from Spielberg’: readers pay tribute to Sam Neill
items.body: From teeing up a marriage to inspiring a career and giving 144 bottles of wine to his birthday band, the star’s admirers share their fondest memories

items.hook: Conrad's Fate is a children's fantasy novel by British author Diana Wynne Jones published by Collins in 2005.
items.body: It was the sixth published of the seven Chrestomanci books. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: The Red Mouth by Sheila Armstrong review – profound exploration of Ireland’s deep time
items.body:
Sinister bogland discoveries haunt the intersecting lives of four characters in this meditative, exquisitely written tale

Almost 14% of Ireland is bog: vast swathes of moss-carpeted land, below which layers of ancient history have

items.hook: The Prisoner is a 1949 West German historical adventure film directed by Gustav Fröhlich and starring Paul Dahlke, Richard Häussler, and Käthe Dorsch.
items.body: It is based a novel by the French writer Honoré de Balzac. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Hal Williams, actor best known for Sanford and Son and 227, dies aged 91
items.body:
The actor, who also appeared in The Waltons and Private Benjamin, died at his home in California

Hal Williams, the actor best known for TV roles in Sanford & Son and 227, has died at the age of 91.

items.hook: Kit Connor and Joe Locke: 'Making a film like Heartstopper will forever be important'
items.body: The Netflix movie brings Alice Oseman's popular screen adaptation to a conclusion.

items.hook: The Flute-Player is a fiction book by British novelist, poet, playwright and translator Donald Michael Thomas, known as D.
items.body: Thomas considers the book to be one of his six strongest novels. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Kris Jenner's mother Mary Jo dies aged 91
items.body: Mary Jo 'MJ' Campbell was featured on multiple episodes of Keeping Up with the Kardashians over the years.

items.hook: The 2025–26 season is Damac's 54th year in their history and seventh consecutive season in the Pro League.
items.body: The club will participate in the Pro League and the King's Cup. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.body:
